idea-plugin.name: Gixy - Nginx Security Scanner
idea-plugin.description:
Security analyzer for NGINX configuration files, powered by gixy.

Detects security misconfigurations in your nginx configs and suggests fixes — right in your IDE.

Features

  • 30+ security checks (SSRF, header injection, path traversal, etc.)
  • Inline annotations with severity levels
  • One-click quick-fix suggestions
  • Links to detailed documentation for each finding
  • Works with any nginx config file (*.conf, nginx.conf, etc.)

How it works

The plugin runs gixy analysis in the background and highlights security issues directly in the editor. A bundled gixy binary is downloaded automatically on first use — no Python installation required.
